mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, product_id, quantity, total_price, order_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{orderTime})
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, u.username AS user_name, p.product_name AS product_name, o.quantity, o.total_price, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS order_time FROM orders o INNER JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
